title: Angel Extra Utilities
description: Adds unique decorative and functional blocks inspired by Extra Utilities 2. Perfect for players seeking aesthetic and practical building options.
body:
![Angel Utilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/722bfdcbc3195fabe4cdf6ecc543d3257f55861d_0.webp)

Angel Utilities is a Minecraft mod that introduces unique blocks focused on aesthetics and functionality, inspired by the popular Extra Utilities 2 mod. While still in early development, the mod currently includes:

- Angel Block
- Deep Dark
- Bedrock Cobblestone, Bricks, Stairs, and Slabs
- Sandy Glass, Thickened Glass, Bordered and Patterned Thickened Glass
- Creative Water, Energy and Lava Source
- Compressed Sugar Cane, Compressed Cactus, Sugar Cane Planks and Mosaic
- Single-Nonuple Compressed Cobblestone and Double Compressed Cactus and Sugar Cane
- Compressed and Double Compressed Sand, Stone, Dirt and Gravel

Planned Future Features:

- Energy Generation: Generators that convert fuels like coal, food, or Nether stars into energy.
- Block Compression: Systems to compact materials like cobblestone, sand, and dirt, increasing their durability and utility.
- Special Tools and Weapons: Unique tools with abilities such as faster mining or armor-piercing swords.
- Automation and Storage: Blocks for item, liquid, and energy transport, as well as advanced storage solutions.

Angel Utilities is perfect for players looking to expand their worlds with distinctive blocks, while eagerly anticipating future features that will bring even more creativity, practicality, and fun to Minecraft.
